action.name: Open Chest.
action.args: @! You got a GORGEOUS PIECE OF FINE ART. @! Absolutely breathtaking.

action.name: Open Chest.
action.args: @! You got DEUCE CLUBS. @! Least deadly pair of juggling clubs in the universe.

action.name: Open Chest.
action.args: @! You got the DEMONBANE RAGRIPPER! @! Deadliest chainsaw in the universe.

action.name: Open Chest.
action.args: @! You got a BRAINFORK! @! For some reason you guys like to nab each others weapons and tuck them away in your own pivate chests. It's kind of silly. Seriously, what do you need this thing for??

action.name: Open Chest.
action.args: @! You got LIKE 13 BOONDOLLARS OR SOMETHING. @! Whoop dee doo! You toss them into the abyss and make a wish.

action.name: Open Chest.
action.args: @! You got THE ASSASSINATED CORPSE OF LIAISON PUMPKINSNUFFLE! @! Some bastard got to one of your key witnesses! The plot thickens.

action.name: Open Chest.
action.args: @! You got a pair of ROCKET WINGS! @! PSWOOOOP!

action.name: Open Chest.
action.args: @! You got a BEAGLE AEGIS! @! Wearing this, you are all but indestructible.

action.name: Open Chest.
action.args: @! You got a MUSIC BOX TIME MACHINE!

action.name: Open Chest.
action.args: @! You got a FAIRY POSTER! @! Yep, pretty much nothing that's not fake about fairies, that's for sure.

action.name: Open Chest.
action.args: @! You got A BOONBUCK! @! How trivial it seems now compared to your fortune of boonbonds. You chuck it into the chasm below.

action.name: Open Chest.
action.args: @! You got SON OF LEMONSNOUT! @! He smells no less sweet than the corrupt senator. And yet his lies... how they stink. The lemon never falls far from the tree!
